hero.title: A quiet place to think carefully about hard decisions.
hero.subhead: Built on a multi-source framework drawing from analytic philosophy and classical Islamic intellectual tradition. Your data never leaves your device. Open source.

truth.title: Truth
truth.body: Distinguish how strongly a claim is evidenced and what kind of assent it warrants from you: sense, reason, mass-transmission, single source, cumulative case, or no basis. Speak with the certainty your evidence actually warrants — and no more.

ethics.title: Ethics
ethics.body: Reason and conscience perceive the broad outline of right and wrong; revelation addresses the case where it does; the human function is preserved; and your intention is what it actually is. When the four converge you stand on solid ground.

benefit.title: Benefit
benefit.body: Five protected goods — religion, life, intellect, lineage, property — and Tāhā's three axes of vital, rational, and spiritual interests. Tiered, not flattened; harm-aversion ahead of benefit-seeking; never collapsed into a single utilitarian scale.

hinge.title: Intention is the hinge that binds the three.
hinge.body: Truth-judgment, ethics-judgment, and benefit-judgment cannot be deductively reduced to one another (Hume and Moore are right). But they cannot be responsibly isolated either: it is one agent who deliberates, with one orientation. This tool does not integrate the three for you. It mirrors them back, so you can see your own intention.
